# ===== Wayback Machine Specific Exclusions =====
# Applied automatically when mirroring web.archive.org URLs
#
# These exclude resource variants generated by Wayback Machine:
#   _if_ : iframe variants
#   _wb_ : Wayback internal
#   _cs_ : CSS variants
#   _js_ : JavaScript variants
#   _im_ : image variants
#   _oe_ : open embedded variants

-*web.archive.org/web/*if_*
-*web.archive.org/web/__wb*
-*web.archive.org/web/*cs_*
-*web.archive.org/web/*js_*
-*web.archive.org/web/*im_*
-*web.archive.org/web/*oe_*
